videos.title: GFNY Bali 2022 full route....ride sepanjang 135 km
HOW TO CLIMB GATE HILL AT GFNY NYC
videos.description:
Gate Hill is the second climb of the race, it's a 3.5 k hill with 186m of elevation gain. Gate Hill should be the most feared. More than being physically demanding, it's mentally challenging because it plays tricks on you at a key point during the race. 
Luis Lemus and Flavio de Luna give us some tips and tactics on how to climb Alpine. 

#cycling #granfondo

videos.title: Rumah Luwih as Official Host Hotel at Gran Fondo New York (GFNY) 2020
videos.description:
Gran Fondo New York (GFNY) Bali is the biggest cycling marathon event in Indonesia. With nearly 2000 cyclers from more than 40 countries come together pedaling their bicycle in a challenging routes. Start from 6.30 am at Jalan Prof. Dr. Ida Bagus Mantra, Rumah Luwih will be the host for this annual event where fellow GFNY riders will share race tips and enjoy special race meals.

An ultimate holiday destination, staying at Rumah Luwih makes it a perfect place to relax and rejuvenate before and after your race.

Rumah Luwih will also be hosting sumptuous dinner for cyclers, highlighting wholesome cuisines on carb-loading in preparation of the the big event on 22 February 2020.

We would like to wish everyone a safe and fantastic race. We look forward to seeing everyone at GFNY 2020.⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
